name: Nooruz
description: Spring equinox celebration marking the beginning of the new year in many Central Asian cultures. It is celebrated with traditional foods, games, and family gatherings.

name: Independence Day
description: A national holiday celebrating Kyrgyzstan's independence from the Soviet Union in 1991. It is marked with concerts, ceremonies, and cultural events.

name: Victory Day
description: A day honoring the victory over Nazi Germany in World War II and remembering the sacrifices of those who fought.

name: New Year
description: A widely celebrated holiday marking the beginning of the new calendar year with family gatherings, decorations, and festivities.

name: Eid al-Fitr
description: An Islamic holiday celebrating the end of Ramadan with prayers, family visits, and traditional meals.

name: Eid al-Adha
description: An Islamic holiday of sacrifice celebrated with prayers, charity, and gatherings with family and friends.

name: Ait Day (Kurban Ait)
description: A significant religious holiday in Kyrgyzstan where people visit relatives, share meals, and help those in need.
